name: bismillah-app
description: Application de restaurants halal - Backend & Frontend

scripts.db:reset: cd backend && npx sequelize-cli db:drop && npx sequelize-cli db:create && npx sequelize-cli db:migrate && npx sequelize-cli db:seed:all
scripts.db:refresh: cd backend && npx sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo:all && npx sequelize-cli db:migrate && npx sequelize-cli db:seed:all
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
